"-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
400 L1A L1A_DEBRIS_B4_BED (L1A) Debris Present in Mouth Prior to Going to Bed CHAR 1 Oral/dental status: oral status and disease prevention - debris in mouth before bed. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
401 L1B L1B_DENTURES (L1B) Has Dentures/Removable Bridge CHAR 1 Oral/dental status: oral status and disease prevention - has dentures or removable bridge. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
402 L1C L1C_LOST_TEETH (L1C) Some/All Natural Teeth Lost CHAR 1 Oral/dental status:
